name: Ihlas Holding A.S.
summary: Ihlas Holding A.S. engages in the construction and real estate, media and communications, manufacturing and trading, education, and healthcare businesses in Turkey and internationally. The company operates through Construction, Marketing, Media, and Other segments. The company manufactures, markets, and sells electrical, electronic, and mechanical kitchen appliances; durable goods; and electrical home appliances. It also operates as an advertising, publicity, and photography agency, as well as a thermal spring tourism entrepreneur; and undertakes installation and contracting works. In addition, the company publishes, prints, distributes, markets, and sells newspapers, magazines, books, and various other publications; operates news agency, and hot spring and health facility; serves as a representative for real estate and durable/non-durable goods; markets bicycles, and mopeds and spare parts; provides IT and Internet services; sets up networks; trades in computers and computer components; and invests in, builds, operates, and sells tourism and health facilities. Further, it is involved in the manufacturing, assembling, trading, importing and exporting of various motorized and non-motorized vehicles, and spare parts; construction, installation, and undertaking of projects; tourism investments and management; real estate purchase and sales; representation, consultancy, import, export, and trading activities with regard to advertising, publicity, photography, publication and advertising agencies; production and marketing of catering; television and radio broadcasting activities; food production; and operation of shipping, personnel transport, and storage and bonded warehouse. Additionally, the company operates a hospital; and provides education services. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
